The '''Class-C cargo container''' was a hexagonal ellipsoid-shaped container manufactured by [[Xizor Transport Systems/Legends|Xizor Transport Systems]] and designed to be carried by [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]] such as the [[YT-2000 light freighter/Legends|YT-2000]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]]. The container was used to store cargo during transit in both [[Realspace/Legends|realspace]] and [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Volatile gasses were usually the type of cargo kept in the Class-C container.<ref name="XWA" />
